film.title: Dirty Politics
film.overview: An old politician lusts after a beautiful dancer.

dialogues.dialogue: These were your words. Evey daughter in this county is C.M# s daughter. And it's a shame that this case cannot be resolved in your presence. The public suggests this case to be handed over to the C.B.l. I concur that evey daughter in this county is C.M# s daughter.
These hoarding should be places all over the city within a week's time. Huge ones. - It will be done. So big that it should put Madras and Lucknow to shame. Okay, sir. Got it? - Yes, sir.
I am pleased to see you progress. it's all thanks to you. No, Anokhi. I am ashamed of what I did. Please forgive me. Anokhi, please forgive me.
